en: By rights, we shouldn't even be here.
ko: 사실 우리는 여기 있어서는 안 돼.

en: It's like in the great stories, Mr. Frodo.
The ones that really mattered. Full of darkness and danger, they were.
And sometimes you didn't want to know the end. Because how could the end be happy?
How could the world go back to the way it was when so much bad happened?
ko: 이렇게 많은 나쁜 일이 일어났는데 세상이 예전으로 돌아갈 수 있을까?
